shapes.name: Maximum Limit
shapes.description: Constraint of the form "maximum X is N" / "at most N" / "no more than N". Body atoms fire when the measured value EXCEEDS the limit (violation-inverted pattern) using a swrlb:greaterThan Builtin atom against a Literal threshold. Rule_Id format: R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V.
shapes.cypher_template:
// 1. OntoGraph -- ontology terms
MERGE (C_Main:Class {iri: 'ex:<CLASS_NAME>'})
SET C_Main.label = '<CLASS_NAME>', C_Main.project = '<PROJECT>', C_Main.graph = 'OntoGraph'

MERGE (DP_Main:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:<PROPERTY_NAME>'})
SET DP_Main.SWRL_label = '<PROPERTY_NAME>', DP_Main.range = 'xsd:decimal', DP_Main.project = '<PROJECT>', DP_Main.graph = 'OntoGraph'

MERGE (B_Gt:Builtin {iri: 'swrlb:greaterThan'})
SET B_Gt.label = 'greaterThan', B_Gt.project = '<PROJECT>', B_Gt.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (DP_V:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>'})
SET DP_V.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>', DP_V.range = 'xsd:boolean', DP_V.project = '<PROJECT>', DP_V.graph = 'OntoGraph'

// 2. Metagraph -- rule node
MERGE (r:Rule {Rule_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V'})
SET r.SWRL = '<SWRL_EXPRESSION>', r.kind = 'violation', r.project = '<PROJECT>', r.graph = 'Metagraph'

// 3. Metagraph -- variables, literals
MERGE (vEntity:Var {name: '?<ENTITY_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vEntity.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (vValue:Var {name: '?<VALUE_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vValue.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (litX:Literal {lex: '<LIMIT>', datatype: 'xsd:decimal'})
SET litX.project = '<PROJECT>', litX.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (litT:Literal {lex: 'true', datatype: 'xsd:boolean'})
SET litT.project = '<PROJECT>', litT.graph = 'Metagraph'

// 4. Metagraph -- atom nodes
MERGE (a1:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V_A1'})
SET a1.type = 'ClassAtom', a1.iri = 'ex:<CLASS_NAME>', a1.SWRL_label = '<CLASS_NAME>', a1.project = '<PROJECT>', a1.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (a2:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V_A2'})
SET a2.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', a2.iri = 'ex:<PROPERTY_NAME>', a2.SWRL_label = '<PROPERTY_NAME>', a2.project = '<PROJECT>', a2.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (a3:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V_A3'})
SET a3.type = 'BuiltinAtom', a3.iri = 'swrlb:greaterThan', a3.SWRL_label = 'greaterThan', a3.project = '<PROJECT>', a3.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (h1:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V_H1'})
SET h1.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', h1.iri = 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>', h1.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>', h1.project = '<PROJECT>', h1.graph = 'Metagraph'

// 5. Relationships -- rule <-> atoms
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 1}]->(a1)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 2}]->(a2)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 3}]->(a3)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_HEAD {`order`: 1}]->(h1)

// 6. Relationships -- atoms -> ontology terms
MERGE (a1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(C_Main)
MERGE (a2)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_Main)
MERGE (a3)-[:REFERS_TO]->(B_Gt)
MERGE (h1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_V)

// 7. Relationships -- atoms -> arguments
MERGE (a1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntity)
MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntity)
MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(vValue)
MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vValue)
MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litX)
MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntity)
MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litT);

shapes.name: Range (Between Min and Max)
shapes.description: Constraint of the form "between MIN and MAX". PRESERVES the existing cypher_template.txt convention: emit TWO SEPARATE violation Rules -- one min-rule (reusing the min_limit shape's swrlb:lessThan pattern) and one max-rule (reusing the max_limit shape's swrlb:greaterThan pattern) -- never a single combined Rule. Both rules share the same Class/DatatypeProperty (MERGE-reused, same iri) but each gets its own violation DatatypeProperty, Var set, and Atom subgraph. No new schema shape is introduced; this entry documents the min-rule + max-rule PAIR together as one worked example.
shapes.swrl_pattern:
MIN rule: <CLASS_NAME>(?e) ^ <PROPERTY_NAME>(?e, ?val) ^ swrlb:lessThan(?val, "<MIN>"^^xsd:decimal) -> <VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MIN>(?e, true)
MAX rule: <CLASS_NAME>(?e) ^ <PROPERTY_NAME>(?e, ?val) ^ swrlb:greaterThan(?val, "<MAX>"^^xsd:decimal) -> <VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MAX>(?e, true)
shapes.cypher_template:
// Shared OntoGraph terms (MERGE-reused by both rules, same iri)
MERGE (C_Main:Class {iri: 'ex:<CLASS_NAME>'})
SET C_Main.label = '<CLASS_NAME>', C_Main.project = '<PROJECT>', C_Main.graph = 'OntoGraph'

MERGE (DP_Main:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:<PROPERTY_NAME>'})
SET DP_Main.SWRL_label = '<PROPERTY_NAME>', DP_Main.range = 'xsd:decimal', DP_Main.project = '<PROJECT>', DP_Main.graph = 'OntoGraph'

// -- RULE 1 of 2: MIN violation rule (own violation property + atoms) --
MERGE (B_Lt:Builtin {iri: 'swrlb:lessThan'})
SET B_Lt.label = 'lessThan', B_Lt.project = '<PROJECT>', B_Lt.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (DP_VMin:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MIN>'})
SET DP_VMin.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MIN>', DP_VMin.range = 'xsd:boolean', DP_VMin.project = '<PROJECT>', DP_VMin.graph = 'OntoGraph'

MERGE (rMin:Rule {Rule_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN>_V'})
SET rMin.SWRL = '<SWRL_MIN_EXPRESSION>', rMin.kind = 'violation', rMin.project = '<PROJECT>', rMin.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (vEntityMin:Var {name: '?<ENTITY_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vEntityMin.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (vValueMin:Var {name: '?<VALUE_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vValueMin.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (litMin:Literal {lex: '<MIN>', datatype: 'xsd:decimal'})
SET litMin.project = '<PROJECT>', litMin.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (litTMin:Literal {lex: 'true', datatype: 'xsd:boolean'})
SET litTMin.project = '<PROJECT>', litTMin.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (a1Min:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN>_V_A1'})
SET a1Min.type = 'ClassAtom', a1Min.iri = 'ex:<CLASS_NAME>', a1Min.SWRL_label = '<CLASS_NAME>', a1Min.project = '<PROJECT>', a1Min.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (a2Min:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN>_V_A2'})
SET a2Min.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', a2Min.iri = 'ex:<PROPERTY_NAME>', a2Min.SWRL_label = '<PROPERTY_NAME>', a2Min.project = '<PROJECT>', a2Min.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (a3Min:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN>_V_A3'})
SET a3Min.type = 'BuiltinAtom', a3Min.iri = 'swrlb:lessThan', a3Min.SWRL_label = 'lessThan', a3Min.project = '<PROJECT>', a3Min.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (h1Min:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN>_V_H1'})
SET h1Min.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', h1Min.iri = 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MIN>', h1Min.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MIN>', h1Min.project = '<PROJECT>', h1Min.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (rMin)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 1}]->(a1Min)
MERGE (rMin)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 2}]->(a2Min)
MERGE (rMin)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 3}]->(a3Min)
MERGE (rMin)-[:HAS_HEAD {`order`: 1}]->(h1Min)
MERGE (a1Min)-[:REFERS_TO]->(C_Main)
MERGE (a2Min)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_Main)
MERGE (a3Min)-[:REFERS_TO]->(B_Lt)
MERGE (h1Min)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_VMin)
MERGE (a1Min)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntityMin)
MERGE (a2Min)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntityMin)
MERGE (a2Min)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(vValueMin)
MERGE (a3Min)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vValueMin)
MERGE (a3Min)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litMin)
MERGE (h1Min)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntityMin)
MERGE (h1Min)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litTMin);

// -- RULE 2 of 2: MAX violation rule (own violation property + atoms) --
MERGE (B_Gt:Builtin {iri: 'swrlb:greaterThan'})
SET B_Gt.label = 'greaterThan', B_Gt.project = '<PROJECT>', B_Gt.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (DP_VMax:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MAX>'})
SET DP_VMax.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MAX>', DP_VMax.range = 'xsd:boolean', DP_VMax.project = '<PROJECT>', DP_VMax.graph = 'OntoGraph'

MERGE (rMax:Rule {Rule_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<MAX>_V'})
SET rMax.SWRL = '<SWRL_MAX_EXPRESSION>', rMax.kind = 'violation', rMax.project = '<PROJECT>', rMax.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (vEntityMax:Var {name: '?<ENTITY_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vEntityMax.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (vValueMax:Var {name: '?<VALUE_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vValueMax.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (litMax:Literal {lex: '<MAX>', datatype: 'xsd:decimal'})
SET litMax.project = '<PROJECT>', litMax.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (litTMax:Literal {lex: 'true', datatype: 'xsd:boolean'})
SET litTMax.project = '<PROJECT>', litTMax.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (a1Max:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<MAX>_V_A1'})
SET a1Max.type = 'ClassAtom', a1Max.iri = 'ex:<CLASS_NAME>', a1Max.SWRL_label = '<CLASS_NAME>', a1Max.project = '<PROJECT>', a1Max.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (a2Max:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<MAX>_V_A2'})
SET a2Max.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', a2Max.iri = 'ex:<PROPERTY_NAME>', a2Max.SWRL_label = '<PROPERTY_NAME>', a2Max.project = '<PROJECT>', a2Max.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (a3Max:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<MAX>_V_A3'})
SET a3Max.type = 'BuiltinAtom', a3Max.iri = 'swrlb:greaterThan', a3Max.SWRL_label = 'greaterThan', a3Max.project = '<PROJECT>', a3Max.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (h1Max:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<PROPERTY>_MAX_<MAX>_V_H1'})
SET h1Max.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', h1Max.iri = 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MAX>', h1Max.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY_MAX>', h1Max.project = '<PROJECT>', h1Max.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (rMax)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 1}]->(a1Max)
MERGE (rMax)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 2}]->(a2Max)
MERGE (rMax)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 3}]->(a3Max)

shapes.name: Ratio Limit
shapes.description: Constraint relating two DatatypeProperties via a swrlb:divide Builtin producing a computed ratio Var, then comparing that ratio against a Literal threshold with a second Builtin (swrlb:greaterThan for a maximum-ratio cap, or swrlb:lessThan for a minimum-ratio floor). Body atoms fire when the ratio breaches the threshold (violation-inverted). Rule_Id format: R_<DOMAIN>_<RATIO_NAME>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V (or _MIN_<LIMIT>_V for a floor).

SET C_Main.label = '<CLASS_NAME>', C_Main.project = '<PROJECT>', C_Main.graph = 'OntoGraph'

SET r.SWRL = '<SWRL_EXPRESSION>', r.kind = 'violation', r.project = '<PROJECT>', r.graph = 'Metagraph'

// 3. Metagraph -- variables, literals
MERGE (vEntity:Var {name: '?<ENTITY_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})

MERGE (a3:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<RATIO_NAME>_MAX_<LIMIT>_V_A3'})

shapes.name: Existence / Count Requirement
shapes.description: Constraint requiring at least N instances of a related quantity (modeled as a count-valued DatatypeProperty, e.g. a pre-computed count on the parent entity) to exist. New territory (D-12): modeled as a swrlb: Builtin ATOM PAIR against a Literal threshold -- one Builtin atom establishes the count value is a valid non-negative existence check (swrlb:greaterThanOrEqual against 0), the second Builtin atom checks the count against the required minimum (swrlb:lessThan -> violation-inverted). Reuses ONLY the documented node labels (Class, DatatypeProperty, ObjectProperty, Rule, Atom, Var, Literal, Builtin) and relationships (HAS_BODY, HAS_HEAD, REFERS_TO, ARG) -- no new schema surface. CRITICAL (Pitfall 1): the Var MERGE for the count variable keys on BOTH name and project -- omitting project reintroduces the historical cross-project Var collision bug. Rule_Id format: R_<DOMAIN>_<COUNT_PROPERTY>_MIN_<LIMIT>_V.
shapes.cypher_template:
// 1. OntoGraph -- ontology terms
MERGE (C_Main:Class {iri: 'ex:<CLASS_NAME>'})
SET C_Main.label = '<CLASS_NAME>', C_Main.project = '<PROJECT>', C_Main.graph = 'OntoGraph'

MERGE (DP_Count:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:<COUNT_PROPERTY>'})
SET DP_Count.SWRL_label = '<COUNT_PROPERTY>', DP_Count.range = 'xsd:integer', DP_Count.project = '<PROJECT>', DP_Count.graph = 'OntoGraph'

MERGE (B_Gte:Builtin {iri: 'swrlb:greaterThanOrEqual'})
SET B_Gte.label = 'greaterThanOrEqual', B_Gte.project = '<PROJECT>', B_Gte.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (B_Lt:Builtin {iri: 'swrlb:lessThan'})
SET B_Lt.label = 'lessThan', B_Lt.project = '<PROJECT>', B_Lt.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (DP_V:DatatypeProperty {iri: 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>'})
SET DP_V.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>', DP_V.range = 'xsd:boolean', DP_V.project = '<PROJECT>', DP_V.graph = 'OntoGraph'

// 2. Metagraph -- rule node
MERGE (r:Rule {Rule_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<COUNT_PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN_REQUIRED>_V'})
SET r.SWRL = '<SWRL_EXPRESSION>', r.kind = 'violation', r.project = '<PROJECT>', r.graph = 'Metagraph'

// 3. Metagraph -- variables, literals
// CRITICAL (Pitfall 1): Var MERGE keys on BOTH name AND project -- never key on name alone.
MERGE (vEntity:Var {name: '?<ENTITY_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vEntity.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (vCount:Var {name: '?<COUNT_VAR>', project: '<PROJECT>'})
SET vCount.graph = 'Metagraph'

MERGE (litZero:Literal {lex: '0', datatype: 'xsd:integer'})
SET litZero.project = '<PROJECT>', litZero.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (litMin:Literal {lex: '<MIN_REQUIRED>', datatype: 'xsd:integer'})
SET litMin.project = '<PROJECT>', litMin.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (litT:Literal {lex: 'true', datatype: 'xsd:boolean'})
SET litT.project = '<PROJECT>', litT.graph = 'Metagraph'

// 4. Metagraph -- atom nodes (existence-check + count-threshold Builtin pair)
MERGE (a1:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<COUNT_PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN_REQUIRED>_V_A1'})
SET a1.type = 'ClassAtom', a1.iri = 'ex:<CLASS_NAME>', a1.SWRL_label = '<CLASS_NAME>', a1.project = '<PROJECT>', a1.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (a2:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<COUNT_PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN_REQUIRED>_V_A2'})
SET a2.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', a2.iri = 'ex:<COUNT_PROPERTY>', a2.SWRL_label = '<COUNT_PROPERTY>', a2.project = '<PROJECT>', a2.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (a3:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<COUNT_PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN_REQUIRED>_V_A3'})
SET a3.type = 'BuiltinAtom', a3.iri = 'swrlb:greaterThanOrEqual', a3.SWRL_label = 'greaterThanOrEqual', a3.project = '<PROJECT>', a3.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (a4:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<COUNT_PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN_REQUIRED>_V_A4'})
SET a4.type = 'BuiltinAtom', a4.iri = 'swrlb:lessThan', a4.SWRL_label = 'lessThan', a4.project = '<PROJECT>', a4.graph = 'Metagraph'
MERGE (h1:Atom {Atom_Id: 'R_<DOMAIN>_<COUNT_PROPERTY>_MIN_<MIN_REQUIRED>_V_H1'})
SET h1.type = 'DataPropertyAtom', h1.iri = 'ex:<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>', h1.SWRL_label = '<VIOLATION_PROPERTY>', h1.project = '<PROJECT>', h1.graph = 'Metagraph'

// 5. Relationships -- rule <-> atoms
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 1}]->(a1)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 2}]->(a2)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 3}]->(a3)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {`order`: 4}]->(a4)
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_HEAD {`order`: 1}]->(h1)

// 6. Relationships -- atoms -> ontology terms
MERGE (a1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(C_Main)
MERGE (a2)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_Count)
MERGE (a3)-[:REFERS_TO]->(B_Gte)
MERGE (a4)-[:REFERS_TO]->(B_Lt)
MERGE (h1)-[:REFERS_TO]->(DP_V)

// 7. Relationships -- atoms -> arguments
MERGE (a1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntity)
MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntity)
MERGE (a2)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(vCount)
MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vCount)
MERGE (a3)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litZero)
MERGE (a4)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vCount)
MERGE (a4)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litMin)
MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 1}]->(vEntity)
MERGE (h1)-[:ARG {`pos`: 2}]->(litT);
